bird.name: 峽灣企鵝
bird.summary: 黄眉企鹅（台湾作鳳冠企鵝，学名：Eudyptes pachyrhynchus），又稱作毛利企鵝（Tawaki）、黄眉企鹅、峽灣冠企鵝和福德蘭企鵝，是冠企鵝的一種，主要棲息在紐西蘭南島的海岸、菲奧德蘭和附近的斯圖爾特島。黄眉企鹅於1845年由英國動物學家喬治·羅伯特·格雷描述。…

locations.name: 菲奥德兰
locations.summary: 菲奥德兰（英語：Fiordland）是新西兰南岛西南角的一个地理区域，新西兰国内最大的国家公园──占地12,120平方千米的菲奥德兰国家公园覆盖该区的大部分面积。南阿尔卑斯山脉及其西面被海水淹浸的山谷形成了菲奥德兰的地理特征。区内的布朗瀑…

locations.name: Bruce Bay
locations.summary: Bruce Bay is a bay and settlement in South Westland, New Zealand on the Tasman Sea.

locations.name: Open Bay Islands
locations.summary: The Open Bay Islands are located in South Westland, off the south-west coast of the South Island of New Zealand.

locations.name: 福沃海峡
locations.summary: 福沃海峡（英語：Foveaux Strait）位于新西兰南岛南端与斯图尔特岛之间的海峡。宽约30公里。南岛城市布拉夫在海峡北岸。沟通塔斯曼海与太平洋。

locations.name: 斯圖爾特島
locations.summary: 斯圖爾特島（英語：Stewart Island；毛利語：Rakiura）是紐西蘭的第三大島，位於南島南方大約30公里，與南島相隔福沃海峽遙望因沃卡格爾的布拉夫港（Bluff）。這座東西寬約四十公里，人口不到五百人的島嶼，之所以吸引人，就在…

locations.name: 澳大利亚
locations.summary: 澳大利亚联邦（英語：Commonwealth of Australia），通称澳大利亚、澳洲（Australia，缩写为AU、AUS），是一个位于南半球中北部、東半球东部的議會制君主立憲制、聯邦制國家。全国整体属于大洋洲（並非自成一洲），…

relations.subject: 峽灣企鵝
relations.evidence: Dee|last1=Mattern|first1=Thomas|editor-last1=Garcia-Borboroglu|editor-first1=Pablo|name-list-style=amp}} Because it originally ranged beyond Fiordland, it is sometimes referred to as the New Zealand crested penguin. It is occasionally found in Australia

relations.subject: 峽灣企鵝
relations.evidence: It breeds along the shores in the West Coast of the South Island, south of about Bruce Bay and the Open Bay Islands, around Fiordland and Foveaux Strait, and on Stewart Island/Rakiura and its outlying islands. Fossils of this species have been found as far north as the northern end of the South Island, and they probably once nested in the North Island as well. Their range drastically reduced by hunting in Polynesian times, and they are now only found in the least-populated part of New Zealand. The species was also present in Australia.Fanning, L., Larsen, H., & Taylor, P.S

relations.subject: 峽灣企鵝
relations.evidence: The main threats are introduced predators such as dogs, cats, rats, and especially stoats
relations.object_summary: 岛屿鸟类常受猫、鼬和鼠等外来种影响。
